storyInfo: Sakiko returns to the Castle of Dreams to face Morpheus. Sakiko chooses to awaken the members of Ave{@nbs}Mujica with music. In their dreams, the other band members seize their last chance to escape.

attributes.content: From the rooftop, dozens of stories high, the cars and people on the ground are like specks of dust.
We've strengthened security around your home, Miss Nyamu. Until the situation is under control, please refrain from going out if at all possible.
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: With the kidnapper still at large, the agency prefers you scale back your activities for the time being out of safety concerns.
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: Suspend activities...?
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Just temporarily. We're sifting through new prospective partners to ensure your absolute safety.
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: But my fans...
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Miss Nyamu, you are now one of Lungmen's biggest stars. You need to recognize your own popularity a bit more.
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: But...!
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Use this time to get some well-deserved rest, or do something you enjoy.
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: —Just stay put.
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: I'm going to hang up now. The L.G.D. wants to talk with us again.
attributes.name: Voice on the Phone

attributes.content: Stay put, stay home, huh...?
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Nyamu looks around her home—
If it could even be called one.
The massive TV in the living room, which only ever has one viewer.
Someone comes to make the bed every day. It never looks anything but factory new.
Suddenly, something catches her eye.
Found you...
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Perhaps it was not that she had forgotten them; perhaps she just did not want to look for them.
At some point, she chose to abandon them of her own accord.
A set of drumsticks, lying in a corner of the bookshelf.
(Tapping drumsticks together) ...One, two, three, four.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: ...Wow, that was awful.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: You let her go.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: You defied my orders.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: I broke the terms of our contract this time. Here is the penalty fee.
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: Umiri pulls out a bag of gold coins, and places it on the table in front of her boss.
...You're rejecting me.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: I think it would be best if we stayed hirer and contractor.
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: I work better as a lone agent. If I want a partner, I have my bass.
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: No. You want to go back to Francis and his people.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: I've had quite a longstanding interest in their musical parties. Sorry, but I won't be taking a seat at your bigger-stakes table.
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: Hahahaha... When did I ever say you'd have a seat?
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: You've only ever been a chip.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: And a chip not in the hand is worth nothing.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: With those words, the door slams open, and Umiri finds herself surrounded by multiple burly brawlers.
Umiri turns back to look at the boss, and is greeted by the glinting end of a barrel.
The island is about to disappear into the distance.
What's wrong? You've been staring at the island this whole time.
attributes.name: Enthusiastic Boatman

attributes.content: I thought I heard someone calling to me...
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Haha! Must be hearing things. Nothing in these waters except the sound of waves and fowl.
attributes.name: Enthusiastic Boatman

attributes.content: (Glances) Lotta luggage there. Headed to the city to strike it rich?
attributes.name: Enthusiastic Boatman

attributes.content: ...I'm looking for someone.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Ain't that the damnedest thing. You're not the first one to say that...
attributes.name: Enthusiastic Boatman

attributes.content: What...?
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: (Loudly) These waves are getting rough...
attributes.name: Enthusiastic Boatman

attributes.content: Above them, darkness has started to creep into the sky.
(Even louder) Watch out... grab... railing...
attributes.name: Enthusiastic Boatman

attributes.content: But it is too late.
A wave crashes down on the deck, and sends seawater flooding into the cabins.
Wrong... wrong... wrong!
attributes.name: Mutsumi Wakaba

attributes.content: This guitar sounds... wrong.
attributes.name: Mutsumi Wakaba

attributes.content: But she knows why full well. A classical guitar could never make the sound of an electric.
(Quietly) It's awful late, Mutsumi-chan. Won't you get some sleep?
attributes.name: Mutsumi's Father

attributes.content: (Quietly) Look, at least just unlock the door...
attributes.name: Mutsumi's Father

attributes.content: (Quietly) We'll sit by your side and tell you bedtime stories, just like old times.
attributes.name: Mutsumi's Mother

attributes.content: Not unless you tell me... where Saki went.
attributes.name: Mutsumi Wakaba

attributes.content: Well, we don't know either...
attributes.name: Mutsumi's Mother

attributes.content: Maybe she went off and found her own happiness, somewhere else?
attributes.name: Mutsumi's Mother

attributes.content: ...You're lying.
attributes.name: Mutsumi Wakaba

attributes.content: Saki's not like that.
attributes.name: Mutsumi Wakaba

attributes.content: There is no response from outside the door.
Saki won't change so easily. She wants me to return to Ave{@nbs}Mujica—
attributes.name: Mutsumi Wakaba

attributes.content: You mustn't change so easily either, Mutsumi-chan.
attributes.name: Mutsumi's Mother

attributes.content: Somehow, Mutsumi's mother is standing behind her.
This isn't just your dream. It's ours too.
attributes.name: Mutsumi's Mother

attributes.content: We are all Mutsumi.
attributes.name: Mutsumis

attributes.content: This is our dream, together. Where we can all truly exist, where we all find happiness.
attributes.name: Mutsumis

attributes.content: Mutsumi-chan, you don't need Sakiko. You only need us.
attributes.name: Mutsumis

attributes.content: No...
attributes.name: Mutsumi Wakaba

attributes.content: Let's be—together—forever—and ever—okay?
attributes.name: Mutsumis

attributes.content: No—!
attributes.name: Mutsumi Wakaba

attributes.content: Ten minutes left...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Bye, Miss Iris! Bye, Miss Bena—
attributes.name: Children

attributes.content: Bye-bye, bye now!
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: You be good children, just like you promised!
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: We will—
attributes.name: Children

attributes.content: Iris, Bena, all set? In that case, let's—
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Wait!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Miss Sakiko...?
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: I thought you wouldn't come...
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: *pant*... *pant*...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Iris... the necklace...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: N-Necklace?
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: In your left pocket—the necklace in the little box that keeps the nightmares away!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: What are you talking about, Miss Sakiko? I don't... what?
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Iris reflexively reaches into her pocket, and is surprised to indeed find something in there.
Sakiko... you don't actually have precognition, do you?
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Center stage. Mutsumi lies in a pool of blood.
My child! Oh, my child!
attributes.name: Mother

attributes.content: Help her! Somebody!
attributes.name: Mother

attributes.content: What's wrong? Is she hurt?
attributes.name: Director

attributes.content: Poor girl! She's dead! How horrible!
attributes.name: Female Lead

attributes.content: It's all a trick! She's not dead. How could she be dead?
attributes.name: Male Lead

attributes.content: (Noisy chirping)
attributes.name: Other Actors

attributes.content: (Excited chirping)
attributes.name: Other Actors

attributes.content: Cut!
...You're an abysmal actor, Wolff.
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Sorry. Acting's not my forte.
attributes.name: Wolff

attributes.content: (Merry laughter)
attributes.name: Corettons

attributes.content: Oh, and you think YOU were any better?!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: (Panicked crying)
attributes.name: Corettons

attributes.content: This won't do. I'm still short of actors... I need one more...
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Morpheus stares daggers at the center of the stage. There, a blue-haired girl sits, eyes closed, but brow furrowed as ever in struggle.
(Dismayed chirping)
attributes.name: Corettons

attributes.content: It's a Siracusan play. Caused quite the controversy, in its opening run.
attributes.name: Wolff

attributes.content: True and false, false and true, why does everyone tie themselves in knots over which is which?
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Human beings have too strong a need to know everything down to the core.
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Perhaps, it's the very thing that makes them human.
attributes.name: Wolff

attributes.content: I'm sorry. I spoke out of line again.
attributes.name: Wolff

attributes.content: No... Wolff. You're fluent now.
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Maybe it's all the rehearsals lately... Then again, maybe it's not the rehearsals, but the things I've been seeing. The sort of things that grow a heart a size or two.
attributes.name: Wolff

attributes.content: Can a woven creation have a 'heart'?
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: The books tell of a metal man who gained one. Perhaps I can too.
attributes.name: Wolff

attributes.content: Tut. Shouldn't have let you read so much... I liked your stuttering better.
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: She has no 'heart' anymore?!
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: I can patch her back up, but without a heart, she'll never leave this place again...
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: You decide... decide Morpheus's fate.
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: (Oh, Iris... oh, Bena...)
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Alas. It would be better if you didn't talk.
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: If only, if only, everyone was like me...
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Morpheus. It's time we ended this farce of yours.
Upon the stage, where a doll slumbered, now a doll stands.
What? Excuse me? How?
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: This isn't right! No, how could you—
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: I made myself clear. I will not be leaving my companions until I have awoken them.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Well, I'll give you two choices—
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: One! Get out of my sight, right now.
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Two! I trap you under layers and layers and LAYERS of dreams, and you stay lost in Limbo forever.
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: I decline.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: You think you can—?!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Sakiko reaches into her pocket.
(Yes. It's still there.)
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Iris's necklace has accompanied her through layer after layer of dreams, and it has followed her here.
Now, she will save Ave{@nbs}Mujica. She will save everyone.
Our bet is still on.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: In their dreams, I saw their innermost thoughts.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Even as their wishes came true one by one, they found no happiness in it.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: They are no hypocrites for it. They are simply still in doubt.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: As the founder of Ave{@nbs}Mujica, I pledged to them that I would take responsibility for their lives.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: From the moment I uttered those words, our fates became inseparable...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: My role is to show the path to lost dolls. I will lead them through the fog, for I must.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Center stage, Sakiko Togawa stands. She casts her eye over her slumbering companions, then returns her gaze to Morpheus.
They, and you... are no more than lost dolls.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: In the moonlight, the doll takes on a temporal life.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Awaken—
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Stop her!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: (Terrifying roar)
attributes.name: Corettons

attributes.content: This is our dream. Therefore, we are its Master.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: We will become as we want to be!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Sakiko Togawa slowly raises a hand, and her clothing begins to transform.
She recalls the Originium Arts she learned in her dream; the songs she wanted to write.
As she has practiced countless times before, she casts down a firm finger—
Upon a white piano key.
The note rings clear in every corner on and off the stage, and bids the threads holding up each doll fall slack.
No longer puppeted, they fall to the expanse of the stage one by one.
Be assured that in the face of all your efforts, I can hardly rest on my own laurels.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Despite all our hardships, we came back together and put on a masquerade that belonged to us, didn't we?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I want to write a song—
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: About our struggles, and the possibilities of the future.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: We are a band. Our destinies are one.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: This is my answer.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Put down the guitar, Mutsumi-chan.
attributes.name: Mutsumis

attributes.content: You're our princess. We'll be by your side, whatever you do.
attributes.name: Mutsumis

attributes.content: —Cover her ears!
attributes.name: Mutsumis

attributes.content: (Hugs guitar tightly)
attributes.name: Mutsumi Wakaba

attributes.content: You're not me...
attributes.name: Mutsumi Wakaba

attributes.content: I miss Saki...
attributes.name: Mutsumi Wakaba

attributes.content: Somebody, help...
attributes.name: Mutsumi Wakaba

attributes.content: Honestly, what do I do with you?
The 'Mutsumis' throwing themselves at Mutsumi suddenly crash to the ground one by one, as if marionettes whose strings were cut.
I'm on your side, Mutsumi-chan. I'll listen to your deepest desire.
The fully-armed brawlers are closing in on Umiri.
Time we put an end to this, Umiri...
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: What? What's this song...?
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: AAAAAAAAAARGH!!!
Umiriiiii!
attributes.name: Francis

attributes.content: Francis...?! Where did you just drop in from?!
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: Sakiko told us all about it! We're all just figments of your dream, ain't we?
attributes.name: Francis

attributes.content: Why would you go and believe her nonsense...
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: No! Don't you see, everything makes sense now!
attributes.name: Francis

attributes.content: We trusted you unconditionally because you made us!
attributes.name: Francis

attributes.content: Now that I've accepted it, I feel so light, so free. Umiri, I could do ANYTHING right now!
attributes.name: Francis

attributes.content: There isn't much time! You've gotta get outta this nightmare!
attributes.name: Francis

attributes.content: But how am I going to...?
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: It's your dream! You've gotta know!
attributes.name: Francis

attributes.content: But once I leave, you're all going to...
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: When'd you start getting so hung up on crap?
attributes.name: Francis

attributes.content: Don't you worry! Me and my brothers, we'll think of you when we hold our parties!
attributes.name: Francis

attributes.content: ...Got it!
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: Go!
attributes.name: Francis

attributes.content: Don't let her get away—!
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: Umiri grabs her bass guitar case by the handle, bends her knees and lowers her center of gravity—
I'm—outta here!
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: Umiri, our sister! Buon viaggio!
attributes.name: Francis & Brothers

attributes.content: Miss Nyamu...!
attributes.name: Assistant

attributes.content: A song that none of them have ever heard is blaring at maximum volume.
Yet there is nobody in the room.
Call the security firm!
attributes.name: Assistant

attributes.content: S-She started streaming!
attributes.name: Flustered Guard

attributes.content: Good morn-nyamu-nyamu, everyone! Nyamuchi here~!
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Your girl's soaring through the skies of Lungmen right now! Haha, and I've got a LOT of patrol cars behind me in hot pursuit!
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Whoooo! Feeling good!! Now this is one way to remember Nyamuchi the rest of your lives, huh?
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: And if you do get to hold onto any memories, remember one thing—
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Nyamuchi is the drummer of Ave{@nbs}Mujica—Amoris!
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: (My memories... they're fading, piece by piece...)
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: (The last trace I had of her... it's being erased...)
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: (That song... that song...)
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: (A song of the soul...)
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: (I say... you're mine... you're mine...)
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: (Look... you're so close, yet still...)
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: (Light...)
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: (You're like light...)
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: (You always had the power to make people gather around you, basking in your light and warmth...)
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: (That's who you are... Saki-chan.)
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Performing, shouting your heart out, again and again, never to stop.
...I apologize.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I apologize, for the countless times I've hurt you all.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: But here and now, I want to see you more than anyone—I want to see you as you really are.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: The destinies of Ave{@nbs}Mujica are one. I bear the weight of your lives on my shoulders, and so I will stake my life to protect you.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I beg you... all of you, wake up.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Midnight. The twin moons hang high in the night sky. Now is the hour of the dolls' awakening.
Let us commence the world of Ave{@nbs}Mujica anew.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa
